recommendations.title: Scale before the next burst window
recommendations.description: Provision additional workers a few minutes before the predicted spike to protect SLA.

recommendations.title: Apply traffic shaping for noisy flows
recommendations.description: Limit non-critical traffic so latency-sensitive requests keep lower delay.

recommendations.title: Keep anomaly watch active
recommendations.description: Continue collecting samples to validate whether the optimization reduces the next peak.

insights.title: Prediction confidence remains high
insights.description: The model found a consistent upward trend after 10:10, likely caused by burst traffic accumulation.

insights.title: Best intervention window is now
insights.description: Applying routing and scaling before the next spike should protect the SLA and reduce expected delay.

insights.title: Critical flows should be prioritized
insights.description: Latency-sensitive service classes can be preserved by using policy-based queue prioritization.

alertText: The simulated sample shows a sharp rise in predicted latency. Immediate mitigation is recommended.
